events: Funeral for Gyari in secret cave temple
Goblins share memories of deceased
Old priest performs Fire Painting using red aura
Death King witnesses Guru Doctrine and Fire Painting traits
Realizes goblins are his children
Decides on support not salvation
cause_effect: Goblins developed Fire Painting because mud was scarce in caves
Only aura users can perform Fire Painting, making it endangered
Death King's simple teachings (tattoos, drawings) led to complex culture
notes: Goblins don't separate life and death - only 'Guru' and 'Not Guru'. The old priest's fire art depicts anger (▲), sadness (▼), and darkness (●). Death King feels parental pride and fear.

events: 6 hunters side with Death King, none with Heretic Questioner
Death King buys 40 Oracle Messages
Sends 'The White Lion is by your side' to 40 goblin leaders
Old priest exhausts himself spreading message through caves
Goblins begin shouting and rebelling in mines
Death King possesses lion in colosseum
Roars 'Guru!' triggering full rebellion
cause_effect: Oracle messages restore goblin hope and trigger rebellion
Lion's roar confirms divine presence and breaks snail morale
Heretic Questioner's 200-year rule begins to collapse
notes: The old priest uses last of his aura to amplify the oracle message through echoing caves. The rebellion starts in the mines and spreads.

events: Snails blow horns using dead snail shells
Death King breaks cage and climbs central pillar
Uses Infernal Heavens First Form to shatter snail religious pillar
Heretic Questioner possesses golden hound and attacks
Hound vs lion battle in dust cloud
Black Dragon Master's black swan arrives
Vampires, mermaids, sprites, elves, humans all rebel simultaneously
Rimepolis falls to rebels
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - First Form: The Burning Young Sword
cause_effect: Destroying the pillar destroys snail religious morale
Heretic Questioner tries to buy time for snails to regroup
Other five races rebel at same time, overwhelming snail empire
notes: The golden hound has jeweled teeth and perfumed oil, making it easy to track. Heretic Questioner admits he'll obey Death King if proven more capable.

events: Flashback to young goblins hearing about rain from elders
Black swan helps lion fight golden hound
Liberation messages appear for mines, red light district, temple, gate, barracks, port
Mermaids eat snail overseers and sink ships
Allied races share unified rage against snails
Death King walks away without ordering revenge
Goblins choose to follow him instead of killing snails
deaths: Many snail soldiers killed by rebels
cause_effect: Death King refuses to command revenge, letting goblins choose their own path
Goblins' choice to follow rather than kill shows moral growth
The escape from Rimepolis officially begins
notes: The six races finally share the same feeling: rage. But Death King demonstrates mercy by walking away, and the goblins follow his example.

events: Goblins exit cave, see sunset and sky for first time
Goblin Race status updates: Extinction Grade B, 'We are fire'
Death King buys Dream Appearance for 100 points
Enters Gorke's dream as human form
Teaches Gorke aura by beating him in dream (Shibal method)
Gorke learns aura and becomes Fire Painting heir
cause_effect: Fire Painting trait was at risk due to priest's death
Dream teaching allows rapid aura learning without physical injury
Gorke becomes heir and preserves goblin culture
notes: Gorke calls Death King a demon in dreams but accepts him after shoulder pat. The goblin race has proverb 'We are fire' - fire burns as one despite many directions.

events: Three weeks into journey home
Snail cavalry (dog-riding soldiers) chase goblins
Snail general lies about suppressing other rebellions
Death King uses Oracle Message to expose deceit
Challenges snail general to honorable duel
Forces Gorke to ride on his back
Snail noble Seimsalam with 4 swords accepts challenge
cause_effect: Death King's Oracle Message exposes general's lies to snail army
Honorable duel challenge raises goblin morale
Gorke positioned as champion despite fear
notes: Snail nobility judged by number of tentacles. Seimsalam is from Lekamurime family. The general uses hound mucus adhesion instead of saddles.

events: Death King analyzes Four Swords Style
Fights defensively to let Gorke observe
Gorke finally punches Seimsalam with aura
11 more challengers come forward
Death King deliberately pauses between matches to show off Gorke
Goblins' eyes open to beauty of dueling
Trait 'Greed' changes to 'Competitive Spirit'
Rain falls as 13th challenger defeated
cause_effect: Death King's humiliation of strong opponents builds goblin confidence
Gorke's victories inspire desire for honor and challenge
Rain arrives symbolically as goblins achieve emotional catharsis
notes: Competitive Spirit trait description: 'Life is only life when it flows into the world. If it must flow, I'd rather it be a stream.' Goblins now believe sword=faith, dueling=process, victory=proof.

events: Goblins arrive at ruined Guru after one week
Quest clears - rescued from Rimepolis
Death King enters Gorke's dream to say farewell
Reveals Kekerkker is friend not god
Asks Gorke to teach others aura and spread truth
Heretic Questioner declares Death King his master
Reveals real name Bambolina, former mafia child
Explains 11 years captivity and escape
Admits to hesitating after Somerwin Academy
Death King accepts and gives three orders: no killing, no torture, no locking up without permission
cause_effect: Heretic Questioner's loss makes him recognize Death King's competence
Death King's influence gave Heretic Questioner 'one second' of hesitation - first emotion
Orders establish ethical boundaries for Heretic Questioner
notes: Heretic Questioner gives rusty lock as symbol. Death King calls him 'Mr. Pseudo Sect Leader.' The 'hope' conversation - Death King becomes Heretic Questioner's hope for experiencing emotions.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Group discusses Heretic Questioner's betrayal
Lady appears from floor
Reveals rewards deferred until 40th floor
Splits Heretic Questioner's 54,964 points among 6 survivors (9,160 each)
Sword Saint gets extra 4 points
Items can be bought in advance to affect future history
Death King buys Race Evolution for 8,900 points
Black Dragon Master copies his choice
660 years pass
cause_effect: Heretic Questioner's 200-year rule generated massive point accumulation
Race Evolution will fundamentally change goblin civilization
Lady hints that Death King knows more than he should about future
notes: The Lady mentions 'eating alone is as harmful as poisoning oneself' - hinting at need for shared knowledge. Death King recognizes his future knowledge privilege is ending after 40th floor.

events: Arrive on 33rd floor in middle of battlefield
Can't fly anymore
Multi-race alliance besieging Rimepolis (6th expedition)
Humans=infantry, elves=archers, sprites=cavalry, vampires=aerial
Black Dragon Master uses space transfer to scout with Death King
Confirm Rimepolis is the Holy Land
cause_effect: Rimepolis is holy to all seven races because guardian gods descended there
Alliance formed from former slaves against snail empire
Flying restriction makes this floor more challenging
notes: The Lady mentions 'Neo-Babylonians' cult and R'lyeh reference. Black Dragon Master complains about becoming 'mama pig' for group transfers.

events: Goblins arrive as third party at battlefield
Evolved: nearly human-sized, sophisticated speech, ride lions
Gerkesa declares goblins will end war, not join it
Fire River Council mentioned
Gorke is now 'apostle' in lore
Kekerkker known as 'bad friend' not god
Goblins set camp between both armies
locations: Battlefield between allied camp and Rimepolis
cause_effect: Goblins evolved into hobgoblins due to Race Evolution purchase
600 years of independent development created unique culture
Goblins' neutral position forces both sides to reconsider
notes: Goblins now have 'ugor' speech pattern instead of 'gork'. They swear on Kekerkker AND Gorke. Vampire evolved form is humanoid with dark cloak.

events: Murmu duels elf fighter
Wins by throwing greatsword like windmill
Kills elf and takes white horse for meat
Explains 'Shibal Aura Training Method' - beaten to learn aura
Goblins shout 'Friendship instead of reverence! Trust instead of faith!'
Goblins block both armies with duels
Death King's reputation damaged among companions
cause_effect: Goblins' unconventional fighting style (throwing swords) shocks enemies
Death King's 'education through violence' became cultural tradition
Duel-based warfare blocks both armies effectively
notes: Murmu is ranked 631st in Fire River Council. Goblins are now called 'mold bastards' by others. The 'Shibal' chant becomes battle cry.

events: Goblin Race status: evolved to hobgoblins, Extinction Grade C
Aura Civilization - everyone uses aura, council rankings by strength
Republican Tradition from funeral meetings in dark caves
Chairman Uburka arrives with 3000 lion-riding warriors
Uburka: strongest in history, 260 wins/261 fights
Proposes destroying Holy Land entirely
'If you can't forgive others for having something, no one should have it'
cause_effect: Republican system originated from anonymous funeral meetings in dark caves
Uburka's overwhelming strength makes him hegemon
Proposal to destroy Holy Land shocks both sides
notes: Uburka has albino condition, trained aura to cover body. Council meetings at night - 'Shibal Gor' = strongest. Goblins use trophies from defeated enemies as trumpet decorations.

events: Uburka demonstrates power with aura javelins
Threatens both armies with overwhelming strength
Tower announces Uburka is Hegemon, gives 900 points
Count theorizes goblins are actually in danger of collapse
Too strong = other 6 races will unite against them after snails fall
Death King enters Uburka's dream to warn him
Uburka meditating on mud pond using aura
Senses Death King with 'muscle detection'
Demands Death King prove strength in combat to earn right to advise
cause_effect: Count's political analysis reveals goblin hegemony is unstable
Uburka only accepts advice from those stronger than him
Death King must fight his 'son' to save goblin race
notes: Count compares situation to how guild leaders treated Death King as rookie - bought his name instead of fearing him. Uburka has 'ego muscle' that surpasses 'ego sword'.

events: Death King vs Uburka battle in dream
Uburka reveals 'Internal muscles' concept - aura permeates muscles
Uses Giant Mode - aura mech the size of a hill
Death King uses Burning Young Sword against giant
Realizes he can combine his style (attracting screams) with Uburka's (expanding)
Teaches Uburka to embed emotions and images into aura
Uburka's punch produces fire tongues resembling Infernal Heavens
Uburka acknowledges Death King's strength
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - Reformation: First Form The Burning Young Sword
Shibal Aura Method - Giant Style: Humiliating Fist
cause_effect: Uburka's giant mode is pure aura expansion, not physical growth
Death King realizes both expansion and attraction can coexist in aura usage
Teaching Uburka emotional embedding advances goblin martial arts
notes: Uburka was born with albinism, trained aura to compensate. 'Humiliating Fist' technique name is as elegant as 'tadpole's eyes.' Death King uses image of Rimepolis pit children to teach emotional aura.
